testcase.name: test_01_get_system_currencies

failure.message: AssertionError: Currency should have 'code' assert 'code' in {'decimal_places': 0, 'name': 'دينار عراقي', 'name_en': 'Iraqi Dinar', 'rate_to_usd': 0.00076, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_system_settings_iter61.py:34: in test_01_get_system_currencies assert "code" in iqd, "Currency should have 'code'" E AssertionError: Currency should have 'code' E assert 'code' in {'decimal_places': 0, 'name': 'دينار عراقي', 'name_en': 'Iraqi Dinar', 'rate_to_usd': 0.00076, ...}

testcase.name: test_02_get_system_languages

failure.message: AssertionError: Language should have 'code' assert 'code' in {'dir': 'rtl', 'name': 'العربية', 'name_en': 'Arabic'}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_system_settings_iter61.py:57: in test_02_get_system_languages assert "code" in ar, "Language should have 'code'" E AssertionError: Language should have 'code' E assert 'code' in {'dir': 'rtl', 'name': 'العربية', 'name_en': 'Arabic'}

testcase.name: test_03_get_system_countries

failure.message: AssertionError: Country should have 'code' assert 'code' in {'currency': 'IQD', 'language': 'ar', 'name': 'العراق', 'name_en': 'Iraq'}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_system_settings_iter61.py:80: in test_03_get_system_countries assert "code" in iq, "Country should have 'code'" E AssertionError: Country should have 'code' E assert 'code' in {'currency': 'IQD', 'language': 'ar', 'name': 'العراق', 'name_en': 'Iraq'}

testcase.name: test_10_create_driver_with_name_phone_pin

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 422 assert 422 in [200, 201] + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_system_settings_iter61.py:223: in test_10_create_driver_with_name_phone_pin assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Expected 200/201, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 422 E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
